Sun is conjunct Venus. When Jupiter,

Jupt
moves to Pisces in his rounds, he

Saturn. The transit . indicates

Rahu
native (Jupiter). So, we cannot
have the same results always. The
"particular place of conjunction, the planet involved and other influences
